$description: Fluent 2 flavor — a full DTCG override of the webtheme platform default capturing Fluent 2's default light-mode token roles in oklch: the #0f6cbd cornflower-blue accent, a 4px `borderRadiusSmall` seed with a 6px medium and 8px large, neutral grey surfaces (colorNeutralBackground1 #ffffff, colorNeutralStroke1 #d1d1d1), a Segoe UI/Variable typeface, and subtle box-shadow depth layers (shadow4/shadow16). Overrides only the roles Fluent 2 names; every other family inherits the platform default via `extends`. Values transcribe Fluent 2's default light-theme global tokens — see the paired gap list report for what these roles CAN and CANNOT reach in a rendered FUI component.

color.$description: Fluent 2's core color roles. Fluent 2 ships a 16-step palette per hue plus flat semantic tokens (colorBrandBackground, colorNeutralBackground1, colorNeutralStroke1 …); each is transcribed here onto the closest platform-default color role. Fluent's `colorNeutralForeground*` on-color pairings and the filled color-scale steps have no platform-default home — recorded in the gap list.

accent.$description: Fluent 2 colorBrandBackground #0f6cbd — the cornflower-blue primary that distinguishes Fluent from a near-black or indigo default.

accent-hover.$description: Fluent 2 colorBrandBackgroundHovered #115ea3 (one step darker on the brand ramp).

radius.$description: Fluent 2 keys radius off `borderRadiusSmall: 4px`; `borderRadiusMedium` (6px) and `borderRadiusLarge` (8px) are named constants (not calc-derived). `borderRadiusCircular` (9999px) is the pill shape.

md.$description: Fluent 2 borderRadiusMedium — inputs and medium components.

ring.$description: Fluent 2's focus affordance. Fluent 2 draws a 2px colorStrokeFocus2 (#000000 on light, high-contrast) ring with an inner 1px colorStrokeFocus1 (#ffffff) offset ring; the platform-default `ring` role (#1316) is the closest home.

surface.$description: Fluent 2's neutral surface roles (colorNeutralStroke1 #d1d1d1 for borders, colorNeutralBackground3 #f5f5f5 for muted panels, colorNeutralForeground3 #707070 for muted/secondary text).

border.$description: Fluent 2 colorNeutralStroke1 #d1d1d1 — the default control/card border.

input.$description: Fluent 2 colorNeutralStroke1 #d1d1d1 — the input field outline (same as border in default theme).

muted.$description: Fluent 2 colorNeutralBackground3 #f5f5f5 — the muted panel/subtle surface background.
